sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong gum Topa kei tangin sizo hi,
Mawhna pan kei hong suaktasak hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A mantak pi a nang kiangah kong cih
A mantakpi a nang kiangah kong cih in;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa tung mawhna teng ka nga zo hi,
Ka mawhna leiba teng hong lohsak
Topa thu a um mi khempeuhte in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka mawh, ka khial zong hong thupiak muang ning;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A kilawm kei zong um khial ngei kei ning,
painuam pai un, hong ngai ding ci hi;
Na kiko un Topa thu a umte,
